data.question: How fresh are your mushrooms?
data.answer: Our mushrooms are harvested daily and delivered within 24 hours. We guarantee maximum freshness!

data.question: Do you deliver nationwide?
data.answer: Currently, we deliver to Metro Manila and nearby provinces. We're expanding soon!

data.question: How long do mushrooms stay fresh?
data.answer: Fresh mushrooms last 5-7 days when stored properly in the refrigerator. Dried mushrooms last up to 6 months.

data.question: Are your mushrooms organic?
data.answer: Yes! All our mushrooms are grown organically without pesticides or harmful chemicals.

data.question: How do I use the mushroom growing kits?
data.answer: Our growing kits come with detailed instructions. Simply place in indirect sunlight, mist daily, and harvest in 7-10 days!

data.question: What's your return policy?
data.answer: If you're not satisfied with your purchase, contact us within 24 hours for a full refund or replacement.
